facts: NIT Hamirpur is located in Hamirpur, Himachal Pradesh - 177 005.
5G connectivity available on campus along with WiFi and LAN.
3 free electric vehicles available for campus transport.

hostels_boys.sharing: All hostels are 3-sharing except Neelkanth which has single rooms.
hostels_boys.first_year: KBH (Kailash Boys Hostel) is for first year students.

facts: Night canteens present in all hostels in the mess area.

breakdown.tuition_fee: Rs 62,500 per semester (Open). Exempted for SC/ST/PH. 1/3rd for income 1-5L.
breakdown.one_time_institute_charges: Rs 13,000 (admission, ID card, convocation, dept society, insurance, caution money)
breakdown.per_semester_institute_charges: Rs 20,600 (exam, medical, library, welfare, cultural, technical, seminar, sports, network, common facility, hostel seat, T&P, institute development)

fee_structure.dual_degree: Same fee structure as B.Tech for semesters 1-8. Semesters 9-10 have M.Tech tuition Rs 35,000.

list: SPIC MACAY NIT Hamirpur Student Chapter

canteen.night_canteen: Night canteens present in all hostels in mess area.
canteen.delivery: Swiggy, Zomato, and Blinkit are all available.

facts: Laundries available on campus — pay per use.
No student elections at NIT Hamirpur.
End semester fine for late registration.
Dharamshala Airport is 30 km from campus.
Una Railway Station is 30 km from campus.
3 electric vehicles available in college for free campus transport.

language_climate.note: Located in Himachal Pradesh — hilly terrain, cold winters.

academics.timetable: 1st year even semester timetable (Jan-May 2026) available. 10 sections (A through J + Z for B.Arch). Classes run 9 AM to 6 PM.
academics.courses_1st_year: MA-121 (Maths), PH-101 (Physics), CY-101/102 (Chemistry), CS-121 (Computer Science), EE-101/102 (Electrical), EC-101 (Electronics), CE-101 (Civil/Engineering Drawing), ME-101/102 (Mechanical/Workshop), EN-101 (English), MB-101, HS-101/102/103 (Humanities)
